title: Quadratic formula
wikitext:
== Overview ==
The quadratic formula is <math>x =  rac{-b \pm \sqrt{b^2 - 4ac}}{2a}</math>.
== Matrix determinant ==
The determinant is <math>\Delta = b^2 - 4ac</math>.

title: Hermitian operator
wikitext: A Hermitian operator satisfies <math>\langle \psi | \hat{A} \psi angle = \langle \hat{A} \psi | \psi angle</math>.

title: Normal distribution
wikitext: The normal density is <math>f(x)= rac{1}{\sigma\sqrt{2\pi}}\exp\left(- rac{x^2}{2\sigma^2}ight)</math>.

title: Schrödinger equation
wikitext: The time-dependent Schrödinger equation is <math>i\hbar  rac{\partial}{\partial t}\Psi(x,t)=\left[- rac{\hbar^2}{2m} rac{\partial^2}{\partial x^2}+V(x,t)ight]\Psi(x,t)</math>.

title: Path integral formulation
wikitext: The propagator is written as <math>K=\int \mathcal{D}x\,\exp\left( rac{i}{\hbar}S[x]ight)</math>.

title: Laplace operator
wikitext:
The Laplace operator is <math>
abla^2 f = 
abla \cdot 
abla f</math>.
